drafts.title: Solar motion watch
drafts.subtitle: CME activity is present; review coronagraph context and compare body-pattern notes before posting.
drafts.caption:
Solar motion watch. CME activity is present; review coronagraph context and compare body-pattern notes before posting. Compare this with sleep, HRV, symptoms, and exposures in Gaia Eyes.

#GaiaEyes #SpaceWeather #EarthSignals

visual_style.notes: Use a dark navy/black gradient, subtle spectrogram texture, small Gaia Eyes branding, one glass text panel, up to eight context chips, and no more than two metrics.

Gaia Eyes cosmic health-pattern background: earth glow, subtle signal lines, deep navy field, and premium wellness-tech restraint.

Copy intentionally avoids medical causality and symptom prediction.
